# Haus of Balloons

> Bespoke balloon garlands, backdrops, and event installations serving the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) and Greater Vancouver, Canada.

Haus of Balloons is a balloon décor studio creating custom balloon garlands, backdrops, arches, and full event installations for birthdays, baby showers, weddings, anniversaries, and corporate/brand events. Based in Toronto and Vancouver, serving the GTA and Greater Vancouver.

## About
Haus of Balloons is a team of creative artists making custom balloon decor for birthdays, weddings, baby showers, graduations, corporate events, and other special occasions. Services include balloon arches, custom number displays, balloon bouquets, backdrops, sculptures, and unique installations. Every design is customized to the client's style, theme, and budget.

## How it works
1. Share your vision.
2. Share your event details: date, venue, colour palette, inspiration, and must-have moments.
3. Haus of Balloons designs, delivers, installs, and handles teardown when included.

## Contact
- Website: https://hausofballoons.ca/
- Toronto email: toronto@hausofballoons.ca
- Vancouver email: vancouver@hausofballoons.ca
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hausofballoons.ca/
- Service area: Toronto & the GTA; Vancouver & Greater Vancouver.
- Request a quote: https://hausofballoons.ca/#get-in-touch
